zh.lifeSummary: 當Bishop Guy D'Avesnes於1253年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯時，他的父親Jean Ier d'Avesnes35歲，母親Aleid van Holland gravin van Henegouwen28歲。他至少有4個女兒。他去世於1317年5月28日在荷蘭武特雷特武特雷特享年64歲，埋葬在荷蘭武特雷特武特雷特。

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

en.lifeSummary: When Bishop Guy D'Avesnes was born in 1253, in Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Jean Ier d'Avesnes, was 35 and his mother, Aleid van Holland gravin van Henegouwen, was 28. He had at least 4 daughters. He died on 28 May 1317, in Utrecht, Utrecht, Netherlands, at the age of 64, and was buried in Utrecht, Utrecht, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bishop Guy D'Avesnes est né en 1253, à Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Jean Ier d'Avesnes, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Aleid van Holland gravin van Henegouwen, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé le 28 mai 1317, à Utrecht, Utrecht, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Utrecht, Utrecht, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bishop Guy D'Avesnes 1253 in Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean Ier d'Avesnes 35 und seine Mutter Aleid van Holland gravin van Henegouwen 28. Er hatte mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Mai 1317 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Utrecht, Utrecht, Niederlande und wurde in Utrecht, Utrecht, Niederlande begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 4 figlie. Morì il 28 maggio 1317, nel Utrecht, Utrecht, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Utrecht, Utrecht, Paesi Bassi.

ko.lifeSummary: Bishop Guy D'Avesnes(이)가 1253년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 발시네스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean Ier d'Avesnes(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Aleid van Holland gravin van Henegouwen(은)는 28세였다. 그는 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1317년 5월 28일 네덜란드 우트레트 우트레트에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 우트레트 우트레트에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bishop Guy D'Avesnes родился в 1253 г. в местности веиленсиеннесь, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Jean Ier d'Avesnes было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Aleid van Holland gravin van Henegouwen, 28. У него было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер 28 мая 1317 г. в местности утречт, утречт, Нидерланды в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности утречт, утречт, Нидерланды.
